name: True North Copper Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.4464. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.4459 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.4464, stop A$0.3614, target A$0.4800. Risk/reward is 0.40:1.
